statement: In every magma, Equation 3204 (`x = (((y * z) * y) * z) * w`) implies Equation 3132 (`x = (((y * x) * z) * z) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0508
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op (op y z) y) z) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op (op y x) z) z) z)
